author: Warren Reed Baum
name: CrystalGPT + Diamond Fusion (Ternary Crystal Architecture)
blurb: Non-record submission: Novel crystal lattice architecture with diamond fusion junctions, recurrent transformer block with per-iteration crystal modulation gates, and ternary voting ensemble. Inspired by 'Ternary Crystal Computing' (Baum, 2026). Smoke test on M4: 4.18 bpb in 3 min. Architecture is param-efficient (~3.4M) and designed for L(N) optimization under 16MB constraint. Full 8xH100 training pending.
